title: OnlyOffice
description: Self-hosted online office suite (Document Server) for collaborative real-time editing of documents, spreadsheets and presentations.
installation: Uses the official onlyoffice/documentserver image on internal port 80. Deploy the bundled PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ and Valkey (Redis) add-ons; DB_HOST points at 'onlyoffice-postgresql-rw', AMQP_URI at the RabbitMQ service and REDIS_SERVER_HOST at 'rfr-onlyoffice-valkey-readwrite'. IMPORTANT: JWT signing is enabled by default (JWT_ENABLED=true) and the editor will refuse documents from clients that do not sign requests with JWT_SECRET, so the host application (Nextcloud, your custom integration, etc.) must be configured with the same secret. Replace the JWT_SECRET placeholder (openssl rand -hex 32) and rotate the Postgres/RabbitMQ add-on passwords after install. The DB schema is auto-created on first boot against the empty 'onlyoffice' database. Persistent state (cache, fonts, logs, document cache) lives under /var/lib/onlyoffice. The Document Server has no admin UI of its own; reach the welcome/healthcheck page at the app URL, then point an editor host at it. For very large deployments raise the app pod size.
